title: Jadavpur University MSc Diploma in Medical Physics 2026 - Overview

detail.title: Jadavpur University MSc Diploma in Medical Physics 2026 - Overview
detail.short_info: Jadavpur University MSc Diploma in Medical Physics Admission 2026 Notification has been released for the Post M.Sc. Diploma in Medical Physics course for the 2026-27 academic session, and interested candidates can submit their applications online through the official Jadavpur University admission portal within the prescribed dates.

content.text: Jadavpur University MSc Diploma in Medical Physics Admission 2026 Notification has been released for the Post M.Sc. Diploma in Medical Physics course for the 2026–27 academic session, and eligible candidates can apply online through the official Jadavpur University website within the notified dates.

sections.heading: Jadavpur University MSc Diploma in Medical Physics 2026 - Overview

rows: Post M.Sc. Diploma in Medical Physics

sections.heading: Course details - Post M.Sc. Diploma in Medical Physics

items: Nature of the course (Post M.Sc. Diploma focusing on Medical Physics and radiation-related applications in healthcare).
Duration of the programme (usually 1-2 years; mention as per notification once you confirm).
Broad areas of training: radiation physics, imaging, radiotherapy, radiation safety, hospital-based practical exposure, etc.

sections.heading: Jadavpur University MSc Diploma in Medical Physics Admission 2026 - Important dates
Eligibility criteria for Jadavpur University MSc Diploma in Medical Physics 2026

items: Required qualification: M.Sc. in Physics / relevant subject as specified in the notification.
Minimum marks/percentage: mention general guideline (e.g., minimum aggregate as per university norms), but avoid guessing exact cutoff if not clearly given.
Age limit: only if mentioned in the notification.
Other requirements: completion of degree from a recognized university, any prerequisite coursework or specialization, etc.

content.text: If the notification specifies compulsory disciplines (e.g., M.Sc. Physics, Applied Physics, etc.), list them clearly in bullet points.

sections.heading: Jadavpur University Medical Physics Diploma Application 2026 - How to apply online

items: Visit the official Jadavpur University website (jadavpuruniversity.in).
Go to the “Admissions / Notifications” section and open the Post M.Sc. Diploma in Medical Physics admission 2026-27 notification.
Click on the Jadavpur University Medical Physics Diploma Application 2026 link once it becomes active.
Register with basic details (name, email, mobile number) if required, and create login credentials.
Fill in personal information, academic details, M.Sc. marks, and any experience details as asked.
Upload scanned copies of photograph, signature, and documents in the prescribed format and size.
Pay the application fee online through the available payment options.
Submit the application form and download/print the confirmation page for future reference.

sections.heading: Application fee and documents required

items: Mention application fee category-wise (General/OBC/SC/ST/others) as per the notification.

List documents: M.Sc. mark sheets and degree certificate Class 10 and 12 mark sheets Category certificate (if applicable) ID proof (Aadhaar, etc.) Recent passport-size photograph and scanned signature
M.Sc. mark sheets and degree certificate
Class 10 and 12 mark sheets
Category certificate (if applicable)
ID proof (Aadhaar, etc.)
Recent passport-size photograph and scanned signature

sections.heading: Selection process for Jadavpur University Post M.Sc. Diploma in Medical Physics 2026

items: Whether selection is based on academic merit (M.Sc. marks), entrance test, interview, or a combination (as per notification).
Any weightage for relevant experience or additional qualifications, if mentioned.
Publication of merit list and counselling/admission schedule on the official website.

sections.heading: Course fee and intake (if given)

items: Total number of seats/intake capacity for the Diploma in Medical Physics.
Approximate fee structure (tuition fee, other charges per year or per semester). Keep it factual and only mention what is clearly stated in the notification.

sections.heading: How to download Jadavpur University MSc Diploma in Medical Physics Admission 2026 Notification PDF

items: Visit jadavpuruniversity.in.
Open the “Notifications / Admission” or relevant admission section.
Look for Post M.Sc. Diploma in Medical Physics Admission 2026-27 notification.
Click on the PDF link to open the detailed advertisement.
Download and save/print the notification for complete eligibility, schedule and instructions.

items: Notification PDF: Click Here
Online application link: Jadavpur University Medical Physics Diploma Application 2026 (active from 30 March 2026).
Official website home page:Click Here
